audience: North Valley client website builder agents
summary: Public client website pages should read as polished client-specific business copy, never AI prompts, SEO notes, template filler, or internal planning language.

audience: North Valley client website builder agents
summary: Before client website handoff, validate every visitor-facing surface locally and in production, remove sample/fake/setup content, preserve approved design/SEO unless fixing a defect, and report client review issues with before/after evidence.
